title: Montpellier, Occitanie — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Montpellier, Occitanie: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Montpellier is a city in Occitanie with a population of 285,000. A vibrant Mediterranean city with one of Europe’s oldest medical schools, lively student culture, and sunny climate.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
